tagline: Reseller of precision agriculture spray drones (Hylio AG-series, ARES) and heavy-lift UAS, plus GNSS receivers, LiDAR payloads, and ground-control systems. Holds Blue UAS certification for Freefly Alta X. NDAA compliance status and defense-sector contract footprint unknown; public evidence concentrated in commercial ag and geospatial sectors.
